product id: hp-victus-15fd0572TU, FHD Camera w/Shutter, Backlit Laptop
review_text: When I checked the HP Support site, my warranty was showing as starting from 25th March 2025, which was six months before I actually bought the laptop. Apparently, that’s the date the seller imported it from China - and this happens often with HP laptops sold by third-party sellers.

product id: hp-victus-15fd0572TU, FHD Camera w/Shutter, Backlit Laptop
review_text: So effectively, I was left with only about 8 months of warranty instead of 1 year.
